title: 'Stop hiring humans'? Silicon Valley confronts AI job panic
description: SAN FRANCISCO — AI industry insiders want workers to code smarter, think harder and lean into their humanity — but still dodge the question of how many jobs artificial intelligence will destroy.
content:

title: UNM student calls for clear AI rules in the college classroom
description: A University of New Mexico junior describes how artificial intelligence tools like chatbots are reshaping college classes and argues that professors need clear AI guidelines to protect academic integrity and prepare students for the workforce.
content: As a junior at the University of New Mexico studying statistics and English, I regularly see the impact of artificial intelligence in the classroom. Students use it to help complete assignments and teachers use it to create assignments. Yet, in class... [2880 chars]

title: FOBO (The fear of becoming obsolete): How anxiety triggered by AI is taking over workplaces
description: The anxiety over rapid advancements in artificial intelligence (AI) has unlocked a new fear in employees. People are now increasingly facing FOBO, or the fear of becoming obsolete. But are these worries valid? What can employers do to allay these fears?
content:
The anxiety of artificial intelligence (AI) replacing humans is haunting employees across the globe. But, besides worrying about job losses due to the advancements in technology, workers have a new fear.
Employees are losing sleep over becoming irrel... [5929 chars]

title: Michael Burry is still betting against Palantir even after Trump's 'warfighting' praise. AI bubble ready to pop?
description: Veteran investor Michael Burry remains bearish on Palantir Technologies, citing high valuations and AI bubble risks. While optimism persists around artificial intelligence, experts warn uncertainty over profitability and infrastructure spending could challenge long-term returns despite strong technological potential.

title: Editorial: As AI turns classmates into targets, schools and parents are playing catch-up
description: Lake Zurich High School officials said police are investigating reports that students had allegedly used artificial intelligence to generate and share explicit, pornographic images using the likeness of other students.
content:
Every parent should be paying attention to what’s been going on at Lake Zurich High School.

description: LEAD Group has launched ‘Ms Curie’, an artificial intelligence-powered tutor designed to deliver one-to-one personalised learning in classrooms, with plans to roll it out across more than 1,000 schools over the next 12–18 months.
